reason: Verified that SuperAgent can execute browser tools to navigate to a URL and retrieve the page title, with the response correctly identifying the "Example Domain" page.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 and confirmed the homepage loads with the list of available agents.
Step 2: Found and clicked on the "QA-20260502-190150-rkcy" agent in the sidebar, which opened the agent's chat interface.
Step 3: Typed the message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into the chat input field.
Step 4: Clicked the "Send message" button to send the message to the agent.
Step 5: Waited for the agent to complete its response (9 seconds total). The agent successfully executed three browser tool calls:
Step 6: Verified the agent's response displays: "The page title is "Example Domain"." which correctly mentions "Example Domain" as required by the test specification.
